content.en:
this day.

A large number of heavy palace cultivators, under the leadership of Black Mountain and other powerhouses, gathered at the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, with the momentum of wanting to kill.

All of a sudden, the high-level leaders of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce came forward one after another to negotiate with Montenegro and others.

Xiao Ya said coldly: "Montenegro, what are you doing with so many people coming to my Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce?"

"We want to cooperate with the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, and those heavy palace liquid from your Chamber of Commerce can be handed over to us to sell!"

Montenegro said.

"Impossible!"

Xiao Ya refused.

The Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce was directly suppressed by these chambers of commerce, and was almost on the verge of bankruptcy, and now with the help of the heavy palace liquid refined by Ye Tian, it has begun to rise, how can it be possible to hand over this kind of liquid to other chambers of commerce for sale!

Rumble!!!

Black Mountain and other strong men burst out with the power of the heavy palace, as if they were about to kill.

Of course, they won't really do it, once so many Heavy Palace Monks are killed here, it will undoubtedly break the rules of Zilan Mountain, and there will be a real Zilan Guard of Zilan Mountain coming, and they will all be punished.

Large-scale slaughter battles, this is not allowed, unless it is out of the range of Zilan Mountain, the Zilan guards will not care.

Zi Lanwei's strength can far surpass them, the lowest cultivation level is the seventh heaven, and the commander is the existence of the tenth heaven.

Whoever dares to ignore 280 of their rules, that is looking for death!

Montenegro didn't really break out in conflict with the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, but just let the strong people of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce gather here as much as possible and drag them down.

Meanwhile.

The Shadow Thirteen, the killer of the Seventh Heaven and Ninth Order of the Dark Temple, had already infiltrated the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce and found the location of Ye Tian's retreat.

Soon, he locked on Ye Tian.

......

"A cultivator of the Seventh Heaven and the Ninth Order!"

Ye Tian had already noticed the existence of this killer, and the other party himself had killing intent, so he was undoubtedly an enemy.

Swish!

He flickered and disappeared in place.

The next moment, he appeared in front of Shadow Thirteen.

At this moment, Shadow Thirteen was also a little confused, he didn't expect that the target he started was so fast, and his cultivation was not as weak as the outside world said, but reached the Seventh Heaven Realm.

Fortunately, the other party is only the first order of the seventh heaven, and his cultivation is not as good as him.

Shout!

Shadow Thirteen instantly rushed towards Ye Tian, and the long blade in his hand burst out with a blood-colored sword, which was a ground-level heavy building secret method.

However, his attack failed and did not touch Ye Tian.

The next moment.

Ye Tian pressed a finger on the back of his head.

Immediately after, a terrifying force erupted, Shadow Thirteen's head shattered in an instant, and the vitality of the whole person also dissipated in an instant.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, this killer is very powerful, it is absolutely easy to attack and kill a cultivator of the Seventh Heaven, if it is a cultivator of the first order of the Eighth Heaven, if it is careless, he will be attacked and killed.

But what he had to deal with was Ye Tian, Ye Tian's current strength was comparable to that of a cultivator of the Tenth Heaven, and killing a killer of the Seventh Heaven was naturally a matter of thought.

"The Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce and several other chambers of commerce came to trouble the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, and then I was assassinated, it seems that these chambers of commerce did it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He doesn't have definite evidence, but he doesn't need it either.

However, he was not ready to kill those chambers of commerce, maybe those chambers of commerce were not strong, but maybe they had hole cards, and he didn't want to attract Zi Lanwei's attention.

"After the strength is improved, I will go to the trouble of these chambers of commerce!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he disposed of the killer's corpse, leaving no trace, and continued to return to his residence to practice.

......

Seeing that there had been no news from Montenegro and the others, they were also very anxious.

As time went on, they became more and more anxious.

Finally, Zi Lanwei was lured.

Rumble!!!

An incomparably powerful Zilanwei stepped over, and the aura of his body locked on (CHBF) everyone present.

"All leave, no trouble!"

One of the leaders of the Zilanwei commanded.

Montenegro and the others did not dare to refute and retreated one after another.

After returning to the headquarters of the Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce, Montenegro contacted the people of the Dark Temple, and soon got a message from the Dark Temple that the killer who attacked and killed Ye Tian was dead.

The Dark Temple no longer attacked and killed Ye Tian, if you wanted the Dark Temple to continue to attack, you would have to pay a greater price.

"Damn the Dark Temple, you dare to trick me!"

Montenegro never believed that the killer was dead, it must be because the Dark Temple was unwilling to do it, and directly deceived him into failing the mission, and the reward he gave to the Dark Temple was directly swallowed by the Dark Temple.

If he continued to bid and was swallowed by the Dark Temple, then he would have no place to cry.

Besides, he didn't dare to offend the Dark Temple, after all, the Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce was just an ant in front of the Dark Temple.

"Black Mountain, the Dark God Temple can't be trusted, we still have to rely on ourselves, we have to find a way, send a Sevenfold Heaven cultivator who is secretly cultivating, and give the Heavy Palace Secret Master of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce to the Maple Leaf Merchant's Long Discussion. []

"Well, that's the only way, but you have to find the right opportunity!"

"Always keep an eye on the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, once the heavy palace secret master comes out, do it directly. "

Montenegro commanded.

However, since that attack, Ye Tian has continued to retreat, and has been practicing penance except for occasionally refining the Chonggong Xuan Liquid for the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce.

His cultivation is also getting higher and higher.

The Seventh Heaven Second Order!

The Seventh Heaven Third Order!

The Seventh Heaven Fourth Order!

After a period of time, Ye Tian's cultivation had already reached the ninth order of the seventh heaven, and he was only one step away from the eighth heaven.

From the seventh heaven to the eighth heaven, it is undoubtedly a big bottleneck for other heavy palace cultivators, and they may not be able to break through it in their lifetime.

But Ye Tian clearly broke the bottleneck and advanced to the eighth heaven.

With his current strength, he was enough to easily kill the cultivators of the Tenth Heaven, but it was still slightly worse to deal with the cultivators of the Eleventh Heaven.

However, there weren't many cultivators of the Eleventh Heaven in Zilan Mountain.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian focused on understanding the large number of heavy palace exercises and secret methods provided by the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce for him, with these, he could continue to improve his Ten Thousand Methods Heavy Palace Exercises.

The emperor-level heavy palace exercises are not his purpose, there are also supreme-level heavy palaces and ultimate heavy palaces on it, with his heritage, understanding, and realm, it is naturally not difficult to create the supreme-level heavy palace exercises, but it requires a lot of references.

And now, he has the opportunity to refer to it.

He believed that it wouldn't be long before he could create the Supreme-level Heavy Palace Technique, but it would just take a little more time.
